title: The Oldham Man and the Sea
original_title: The Oldham Man and the Sea
overview: At 70 years old, Frank takes on the Atlantic Ocean alone, because why make things easy now? In a small rowing boat and with no one to answer to, he sets out to break a world record and quietly defy everything society expects of age, sense, and self-preservation. What unfolds is a brutal, often beautiful battle between one very stubborn man and a vast, indifferent sea.
